info.title: Scena API v2
info.description: Foundation-phase contract only (docs/API_V2.md). No v2 product endpoint is deployed under this path yet — scena-api itself does not exist as a Supabase Edge Function. This document exists so the envelope/error contract is reviewable before the first real route lands, not to claim a live surface.

managerBearer.description: Manager session access token — the only trust boundary this router will ever accept.

RequestId.description: Correlation ID, echoed from the request or generated server-side. Never used as authentication.

IdempotencyKey.description: Client-supplied key for retry-safe mutations. No server-side store exists yet (docs/API_V2.md).
